title: Things to know before your visit.
subtitle: Have a question? Find quick answers below or reach out to us directly.

items.question: Is Kalpataru Grand a pure vegetarian restaurant?
items.answer: Yes! We are a 100% pure vegetarian restaurant. Our entire menu — from breakfast dosas to dinner thalis — is completely vegetarian with vegan options available.

items.question: What are your operating hours?
items.answer: We are open every day from 8:00 AM to 9:45 PM. We serve breakfast, brunch, lunch, and dinner throughout the day.

items.question: Do you accept reservations?
items.answer: Yes, we accept reservations for both brunch and lunch. Walk-ins are also welcome. Call us at +91 76769 90122 to book your table.

items.question: Is there parking available?
items.answer: Yes! We have plenty of parking including a free parking lot and free street parking. The parking area is wheelchair-accessible.

items.question: Do you offer delivery and drive-through?
items.answer: Yes, we offer dine-in, drive-through, no-contact delivery, and takeaway options. Parcel charges extra.

items.question: Is the restaurant wheelchair accessible?
items.answer: Yes, we are fully wheelchair accessible — including car park, entrance, seating areas, and restrooms.

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, Google Pay, and NFC mobile payments in addition to cash.

items.question: Is it suitable for kids?
items.answer: Absolutely! We're good for kids and kids' birthdays. We have a dedicated kids' menu and a family-friendly atmosphere.

items.question: Do you have a rooftop seating area?
items.answer: Yes, rooftop seating is one of our highlights. The first floor restaurant is spacious and can accommodate large crowds.
